holdings.infoBox: SCDV is an equity ETF with a total of 39 individual holdings. The top holdings are Curtiss-Wright stock at 6.70%, The Ensign Group at 5.64%, Enpro at 5.53%, Gildan Activewear at 5.34%, and Littelfuse at 4.75%.

overview.description: The Bahl & Gaynor Small Cap Dividend ETF (SCDV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in small-cap, dividend-paying US companies. The fund seeks long-term growth of dividend income, downside protection, and total return. SCDV was launched on Dec 11, 2024 and is issued by Bahl & Gaynor.
